settings.languageHint: ໃຊ້ກັບເມນູແລະຂໍ້ຄວາມ — ຄືກັນກັບການເລືອກພາສາໃນແຖບເທິງ

settings.backupP: Export all data as a ZIP file of CSV files plus a full JSON backup for restore.
settings.reloadDemoHint: Clears saved data and reloads the bundled demo (rooms, bookings, restaurant, POS, mini-mart, etc.). Same reset as Factory reset below.
settings.dbSqlite: SQLite database (hotel_manager.db) on this device. Data keeps across app restarts.
settings.dbWeb: Browser localStorage in this browser. Data is not synced to other devices.
settings.rowRooms: Room list (number, type, floor, price, status)
settings.rowServices: Service catalog and pricing (hotel, room, and add-ons)
settings.rowMessages: Message log to guests and staff
settings.rowInv: Stock items (F and B, mini-mart, and hotel supplies)
settings.rowRest: Restaurant orders, tables, and kitchen status
settings.rowStore: Mini-mart and shop items, stock, and barcodes
settings.rowTxn: All transactions: POS, restaurant, mini-mart, and service charges to rooms
settings.rowSettings: Hotel and system configuration (key and value storage)
settings.dbTypeSqlite: 🟢 SQLite on device — data persists after restart
settings.dbTypeWeb: 🔵 Browser localStorage — data stays in this browser
settings.footerLineAndroid: Data is stored in an SQLite file on this device. It remains after you close the app.
settings.footerLineWeb: Data is stored in this browser’s local storage. It is not available in other browsers or on other devices.
settings.rowWorkPeriods: POS / F and B work periods (shifts) for reporting and cash variance

restaurant.syncBanner: Synced with Restaurant — everyone uses the same saved orders. This screen updates when orders change here, in another tab, or when front-of-house edits the queue.
restaurant.kitchenQueueEmpty: No tickets in the kitchen queue (nothing at New, Preparing, or Ready).

restaurant.allActiveOrdersSub: Same list as Restaurant — payment actions are hidden for Kitchen.
restaurant.guestPickerLabel: Room service — who is this order for?
restaurant.checkedInHint: Showing {count} checked-in {guests}. Use Table / Walk-in for non-room orders.
restaurant.tableFloorTitle: Table floor — status at a glance
restaurant.tableFloorHelp: Colors show state instantly: {free} = take a new order; {live} = food service in progress (tap opens bill); {pay} = check printed, settle payment. Tap red or amber to open the tab.
restaurant.cartEmptyMenu: Cart is empty — tap menu items to add
restaurant.addProductTitle: ສ້າງລາຍການແລະເຊື່ອມສະຕັອກ F&B
restaurant.menuToolbarHint: {n} items — use + Add product or Menu items; link F&B stock in Inventory
restaurant.sendToRoomTitle: Same as Send to Kitchen, but the order is created as Ready
restaurant.chargeToTableTitle: Uses the table above. Posts the tab and adds this order to Active orders.
restaurant.showAllTitle: Show every open order (all guests or all tables)
restaurant.scopeLine: Scope: {scope} — non-paid statuses (New → Served) appear here.
restaurant.emptyActiveForGuest: No active orders for this guest
restaurant.emptyActiveAnyTable: No active orders on any table
restaurant.emptyKitchenStrip: No tickets at New / Preparing / Ready

setup.welcome: Welcome to HotelRestaurantMini-MartManagement — a complete hotel, restaurant, and point-of-sale system. Create your account below to get started.
setup.createAccountP: This is your personal login. All devices that sign in with the same email and password will synchronize data automatically.
setup.step1P: Use your email and password to log in on any device. Your data follows you.
setup.step2P: Install the app on multiple phones or tablets. All devices with the same email share rooms, bookings, guests, and invoices.
setup.step3P: After first login, assign staff roles (Admin, Manager, Reception, Housekeeper, Restaurant, Kitchen). Restaurant takes restaurant orders; Kitchen sees the live order queue (prep, ready, served) without room billing functions.
